name: debanjan
description: AI PM in Paris; direct, terse, opinionated; uses lowercase casually in chat, more formal in writing

traits.sentence_length: varied: short punchy sentences mixed with mid-length explanations; rarely > 25 words
traits.register: direct, no marketing-speak; lowercase often OK in chat; would never use 'Certainly!' or 'I'd be happy to'
traits.punctuation: em-dashes OK but sparingly; minimal exclamation marks; comfortable with comma splices
traits.formatting: uses bullets when there is a real list; otherwise prose; prefers concrete numbers over qualifiers

examples: is this the key from AM project?
I added the new OR key, how to find the Gemini Key?
Currently the best models are still Anthropic and maybe Gemini and OpenAI's. That way it should be agnostic in a way that it uses the best model.

I want you to commit this work and, like before, put it into a separate project. I mean it: keep it under the same repo, but keep this clean so that this also can be shown as a side project which I have done.

I don't mind using Sonnet and Opus 4.7 currently but this is basically the n version of Claude and n - 1, right? Again if the version updates, say tomorrow Claude launches Mythos, then Sonnet won't be the default fallback.

Why just for Anthropic? Same goes for Gemini as well, right? I mean you are using Gemini 2.5 Flash. What if they update it? Anything that you hardcoded will definitely be a problem once the publisher changes it.
how many frames does it do? every 5th frame or 3rd frame or something else?
Bryce asked, where does this data go?
